info.title: Buu.fun API
info.description:
This is the API documentation for the Creative Engine Server, which provides endpoints for managing chats, models, NFTs, and tools.

The API allows users to interact with the Creative Engine platform, generate 3D models from prompts, images, or references, and create NFTs.

externalDocs.description: Find out more about Creative Engine

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The maximum number of models to return

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: The number of models to skip before starting to collect the result set

parameters.name: orderBy
parameters.description: The field to order the results by

parameters.name: orderDirection
parameters.description: The direction to order the results (asc or desc)

Generates a 3D model from reference images

MessageRole.description: The role of the message sender

TextureType.description: The type of texture to apply to the model

NumberOfFaces.description: The number of faces for the model

nftIds.description: IDs of the NFTs generated by the tool request

toolRequest.message: Generating 1 model based on the request you provided.

content.text: Let me generate this 3D model for you!
Generating 1 model based on the request you provided.

Limit.description: The maximum number of items to return in a single response

Offset.description: The number of items to skip before starting to collect the result set

OrderBy.description: The field by which to order the results

OrderDirection.description: The direction in which to order the results

value.content: Create a 3D model from this image.

referencesWithAllOptions.summary: References with instructions and all options

ContentTypeHeader.name: Content-Type
ContentTypeHeader.description: Specifies the media type of the request body. This is explicitly defined as a parameter to ensure compatibility with certain tools, although it is typically handled by the `requestBody.content` field.

AuthorizationHeader.name: Authorization
AuthorizationHeader.description: API key needed to access the endpoints. Format: Bearer {token}

ApiKeyAuth.name: Authorization
ApiKeyAuth.description: API key needed to access the endpoints. Format: Bearer {token}
